title: Better Item Frame Cycling
description: This mod lets you cycle item frames backwards
body:
This mod allows you to go rotate items backwards inside item frames, to do that click the Shift and Right click on the item frame.

There is additional configuration that is optional, you can either use the mod menu, or the `/bifc` command. The only config option is `instantUpdate`, which either updates the item frame instantly on the server (sends a lot more data to the server at once) when the setting is on, or otherwise it rotates the item frame 7 times once every tick.
